word: H5466 - סָדִין - çâdîyn - saw-deen' - Fine linen

sections.paragraph:
Original: סדין

Transliteration: sâdı̂yn

Phonetic: saw-deen'

BDB Definition:

  1. linen wrapper
    1. rectangular piece of fine linen worn as outer, or at night, as a sole garment

Origin: from an unused root meaning to envelop

TWOT entry: 1466

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
